subjects.name: Comando para Setproduto.txt
subjects.command:
UPDATE produto
SET
trib_icmsaliqsaida = IFNULL(trib_icmsaliqsaida, '0.0000'),
trib_icmsaliqredbasecalcsaida = IFNULL(trib_icmsaliqredbasecalcsaida, '0.0000'),
trib_pissaida = IFNULL(trib_pissaida, '07'),
trib_cofinssaida = IFNULL(trib_cofinssaida, '07'),
trib_icmsobs = IFNULL(trib_icmsobs, ''),
trib_icmsfcpaliq = IFNULL(trib_icmsfcpaliq, '0.0000'),
med_precovendafpopbolsafamilia = IFNULL(med_precovendafpopbolsafamilia, '0.0000'),
med_margemfpopbolsafamilia = IFNULL(med_margemfpopbolsafamilia, '0.0000'),
trib_genero = IFNULL(trib_genero, '00'),
trib_fatorunidade = IFNULL(trib_fatorunidade, '0.0000'),
trib_unidadetributavel = IFNULL(trib_unidadetributavel, ''),
trib_ipialiqsaida = IFNULL(trib_ipialiqsaida, '0.0000'),
trib_pisaliqsaida = IFNULL(trib_pisaliqsaida, '0.0000'),
trib_cofinsaliqsaida = IFNULL(trib_cofinsaliqsaida, '0.0000'),
comb_percentualbiodiesel = IFNULL(comb_percentualbiodiesel, '0.0000'),
pode_producao_propria = IFNULL(pode_producao_propria, 'N')
WHERE
trib_icmsaliqsaida IS NULL OR
trib_icmsaliqredbasecalcsaida IS NULL OR
trib_pissaida IS NULL OR
trib_cofinssaida IS NULL OR
trib_icmsobs IS NULL OR
trib_icmsfcpaliq IS NULL OR
med_precovendafpopbolsafamilia IS NULL OR
med_margemfpopbolsafamilia IS NULL OR
trib_genero IS NULL OR
trib_fatorunidade IS NULL OR
trib_unidadetributavel IS NULL OR
trib_ipialiqsaida IS NULL OR
trib_pisaliqsaida IS NULL OR
trib_cofinsaliqsaida IS NULL OR
comb_percentualbiodiesel IS NULL OR
pode_producao_propria IS NULL;

UPDATE cliente
SET
tabela_preco = 'NORMAL'
WHERE
tabela_preco IS NULL;

subjects.name: Zerar IPI.txt
subjects.command:
update grupotributacao
set ipi_cst = '', ipi_ex = '', ipi_aliquota = 0.0000, ipi_codigo_enquadramento = '';
